mapper.select: SELECT C.cart_seq AS cartSeq , C.user_seq AS userSeq , C.item_seq AS itemSeq , C.quantity AS quantity , C.reg_date AS regDate , I.item_name AS itemName , I.savefilename AS saveFileName , I.item_price AS itemPrice , (I.item_price * C.quantity) AS totalPrice FROM CART C JOIN SHOP_ITEM I ON C.item_seq = I.item_seq WHERE C.user_seq = #{userSeq} ORDER BY C.reg_date DESC
